testcase.name: contextLoads

main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection org.sqlite.jdbc4.JDBC4Connection@5b322873 2026-05-31T20:31:39.841-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-05-31T20:31:39.873-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] org.hibernate.orm.connections.pooling : HHH10001005: Database info: Database JDBC URL [Connecting through datasource 'HikariDataSource (HikariPool-1)'] Database driver: undefined/unknown Database version: 3.49.1 Autocommit mode: undefined/unknown Isolation level: undefined/unknown Minimum pool size: undefined/unknown Maximum pool size: undefined/unknown Hibernate: create table HT_Usuario(id bigint not null, hib_sess_id char(36) not null, primary key (id, hib_sess_id)) Hibernate: create table HTE_Usuario(dataNascimento date, sexo char(1), HTE_IDENTITY integer, id bigint, cpf varchar(14), telefone varchar(15), cnpj varchar(18), hib_sess_id char(36) not null, email varchar(60), senha varchar(60), nome varchar(100), descricao varchar(500), primary key (HTE_IDENTITY, hib_sess_id)) Hibernate: create table HTE_Empresa(HTE_IDENTITY integer, id bigint, cnpj varchar(18), hib_sess_id char(36) not null, email varchar(60), senha varchar(60), nome varchar(100), descricao varchar(500), primary key (HTE_IDENTITY, hib_sess_id)) Hibernate: create table HTE_Administrador(HTE_IDENTITY integer, id bigint, hib_sess_id char(36) not null, email varchar(60), senha varchar(60), nome varchar(100), primary key (HTE_IDENTITY, hib_sess_id)) Hibernate: create table HTE_Desenvolvedor(dataNascimento date, sexo char(1), HTE_IDENTITY integer, id bigint, cpf varchar(14), telefone varchar(15), hib_sess_id char(36) not null, email varchar(60), senha varchar(60), nome varchar(100), primary key (HTE_IDENTITY, hib_sess_id)) 2026-05-31T20:31:40.747-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists Administrador Hibernate: drop table if exists Anexo Hibernate: drop table if exists Desenvolvedor Hibernate: drop table if exists Empresa Hibernate: drop table if exists Projeto Hibernate: drop table if exists Proposta Hibernate: drop table if exists Usuario Hibernate: create table Administrador (id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table Anexo (id integer, projeto_id bigint not null, nomeArquivo varchar(200) not null, caminho varchar(500) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table Desenvolvedor (dataNascimento date not null, sexo char(1) not null check (sexo in ('M','F','O')), id bigint not null, cpf varchar(14) not null unique, telefone varchar(15) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table Empresa (id bigint not null, cnpj varchar(18) not null unique, descricao varchar(500) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table Projeto (orcamentoEstimado DECIMAL(12,2) not null, prazoEntrega date not null, empresa_id bigint not null, id integer, titulo varchar(100) not null, stackTecnologica varchar(200) not null, descricao varchar(2000) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table Proposta (dataProposta date not null, prazoEstimado date not null, valor DECIMAL(12,2) not null, desenvolvedor_id bigint not null, id integer, projeto_id bigint not null, status varchar(15) not null check (status in ('ABERTO','NAO_ACEITO','ACEITO')), justificativa varchar(2000) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table Usuario (id integer, email varchar(60) not null unique, senha varchar(60) not null, nome varchar(100) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-05-31T20:31:40.805-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-05-31T20:31:41.712-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] Hibernate: select last_insert_rowid() 2026-05-31T20:31:41.841-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Imprimindo usuarios - findAll() Hibernate: select u1_0.id,case when u1_1.id is not null then 1 when u1_2.id is not null then 2 when u1_3.id is not null then 3 end,u1_0.email,u1_0.nome,u1_0.senha,u1_2.cpf,u1_2.dataNascimento,u1_2.sexo,u1_2.telefone,u1_3.cnpj,u1_3.descricao from Usuario u1_0 left join Administrador u1_1 on u1_0.id=u1_1.id left join Desenvolvedor u1_2 on u1_0.id=u1_2.id left join Empresa u1_3 on u1_0.id=u1_3.id 2026-05-31T20:31:41.908-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Administrador [nome=Administrador, email=admin@freelancers.com] 2026-05-31T20:31:41.908-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Empresa [nome=TechCorp Ltda, cnpj=12.345.678/0001-90, email=contato@techcorp.com] 2026-05-31T20:31:41.908-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Desenvolvedor [nome=João Silva, cpf=123.456.789-00, email=joao@dev.com] 2026-05-31T20:31:41.909-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Imprimindo projetos da empresa TechCorp - findByEmpresa() Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.descricao,p1_0.empresa_id,p1_0.orcamentoEstimado,p1_0.prazoEntrega,p1_0.stackTecnologica,p1_0.titulo from Projeto p1_0 where p1_0.empresa_id=? Hibernate: select e1_0.id,e1_1.email,e1_1.nome,e1_1.senha,e1_0.cnpj,e1_0.descricao from Empresa e1_0 join Usuario e1_1 on e1_0.id=e1_1.id where e1_0.id=? 2026-05-31T20:31:41.943-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Projeto [titulo=E-commerce Spring Boot, stack=Java, Spring Boot, Thymeleaf, MySQL, orcamento=15000] 2026-05-31T20:31:41.943-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Imprimindo propostas do projeto - findByProjeto() Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.dataProposta,p1_0.desenvolvedor_id,p1_0.justificativa,p1_0.prazoEstimado,p1_0.projeto_id,p1_0.status,p1_0.valor from Proposta p1_0 where p1_0.projeto_id=? Hibernate: select d1_0.id,d1_1.email,d1_1.nome,d1_1.senha,d1_0.cpf,d1_0.dataNascimento,d1_0.sexo,d1_0.telefone from Desenvolvedor d1_0 join Usuario d1_1 on d1_0.id=d1_1.id where d1_0.id=? Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.descricao,p1_0.empresa_id,e1_0.id,e1_1.email,e1_1.nome,e1_1.senha,e1_0.cnpj,e1_0.descricao,p1_0.orcamentoEstimado,p1_0.prazoEntrega,p1_0.stackTecnologica,p1_0.titulo from Projeto p1_0 join Empresa e1_0 on e1_0.id=p1_0.empresa_id join Usuario e1_1 on e1_0.id=e1_1.id where p1_0.id=? 2026-05-31T20:31:41.946-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Proposta [valor=12000, status=ABERTO, desenvolvedor=João Silva] 2026-05-31T20:31:41.946-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Buscando projetos por stack - findByStackTecnologicaContainingIgnoreCase() Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.descricao,p1_0.empresa_id,p1_0.orcamentoEstimado,p1_0.prazoEntrega,p1_0.stackTecnologica,p1_0.titulo from Projeto p1_0 where upper(p1_0.stackTecnologica) like upper(?) escape '\' Hibernate: select e1_0.id,e1_1.email,e1_1.nome,e1_1.senha,e1_0.cnpj,e1_0.descricao from Empresa e1_0 join Usuario e1_1 on e1_0.id=e1_1.id where e1_0.id=? 2026-05-31T20:31:41.954-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Projeto [titulo=E-commerce Spring Boot, stack=Java, Spring Boot, Thymeleaf, MySQL, orcamento=15000] 2026-05-31T20:31:41.954-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Atualizando titulo do projeto Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.descricao,p1_0.empresa_id,e1_0.id,e1_1.email,e1_1.nome,e1_1.senha,e1_0.cnpj,e1_0.descricao,p1_0.orcamentoEstimado,p1_0.prazoEntrega,p1_0.stackTecnologica,p1_0.titulo from Projeto p1_0 join Empresa e1_0 on e1_0.id=p1_0.empresa_id join Usuario e1_1 on e1_0.id=e1_1.id where p1_0.id=? Hibernate: update Projeto set descricao=?,empresa_id=?,orcamentoEstimado=?,prazoEntrega=?,stackTecnologica=?,titulo=? where id=? Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.descricao,p1_0.empresa_id,e1_0.id,e1_1.email,e1_1.nome,e1_1.senha,e1_0.cnpj,e1_0.descricao,p1_0.orcamentoEstimado,p1_0.prazoEntrega,p1_0.stackTecnologica,p1_0.titulo from Projeto p1_0 join Empresa e1_0 on e1_0.id=p1_0.empresa_id join Usuario e1_1 on e1_0.id=e1_1.id where p1_0.id=? 2026-05-31T20:31:41.973-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Projeto atualizado: Optional[Projeto [titulo=E-commerce Spring Boot v2, stack=Java, Spring Boot, Thymeleaf, MySQL, orcamento=15000]] 2026-05-31T20:31:41.973-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Atualizando status da proposta para ACEITO Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.dataProposta,p1_0.desenvolvedor_id,d1_0.id,d1_1.email,d1_1.nome,d1_1.senha,d1_0.cpf,d1_0.dataNascimento,d1_0.sexo,d1_0.telefone,p1_0.justificativa,p1_0.prazoEstimado,p1_0.projeto_id,p2_0.id,p2_0.descricao,p2_0.empresa_id,e1_0.id,e1_1.email,e1_1.nome,e1_1.senha,e1_0.cnpj,e1_0.descricao,p2_0.orcamentoEstimado,p2_0.prazoEntrega,p2_0.stackTecnologica,p2_0.titulo,p1_0.status,p1_0.valor from Proposta p1_0 join Desenvolvedor d1_0 on d1_0.id=p1_0.desenvolvedor_id join Usuario d1_1 on d1_0.id=d1_1.id join Projeto p2_0 on p2_0.id=p1_0.projeto_id join Empresa e1_0 on e1_0.id=p2_0.empresa_id join Usuario e1_1 on e1_0.id=e1_1.id where p1_0.id=? Hibernate: update Proposta set dataProposta=?,desenvolvedor_id=?,justificativa=?,prazoEstimado=?,projeto_id=?,status=?,valor=? where id=? Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.dataProposta,p1_0.desenvolvedor_id,d1_0.id,d1_1.email,d1_1.nome,d1_1.senha,d1_0.cpf,d1_0.dataNascimento,d1_0.sexo,d1_0.telefone,p1_0.justificativa,p1_0.prazoEstimado,p1_0.projeto_id,p2_0.id,p2_0.descricao,p2_0.empresa_id,e1_0.id,e1_1.email,e1_1.nome,e1_1.senha,e1_0.cnpj,e1_0.descricao,p2_0.orcamentoEstimado,p2_0.prazoEntrega,p2_0.stackTecnologica,p2_0.titulo,p1_0.status,p1_0.valor from Proposta p1_0 join Desenvolvedor d1_0 on d1_0.id=p1_0.desenvolvedor_id join Usuario d1_1 on d1_0.id=d1_1.id join Projeto p2_0 on p2_0.id=p1_0.projeto_id join Empresa e1_0 on e1_0.id=p2_0.empresa_id join Usuario e1_1 on e1_0.id=e1_1.id where p1_0.id=? 2026-05-31T20:31:41.988-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Proposta atualizada: Optional[Proposta [valor=12000, status=ACEITO, desenvolvedor=João Silva]] 2026-05-31T20:31:41.988-03:00 INFO 103210 --- [ main] b.u.dc.dsw.FreelancersJpaApplication : Removendo anexo Hibernate: select a1_0.id,a1_0.caminho,a1_0.nomeArquivo,a1_0.projeto_id,p1_0.id,p1_0.descricao,p1_0.empresa_id,e1_0.id,e1_1.email,e1_1.nome,e1_1.senha,e1_0.cnpj,e1_0.descricao,p1_0.orcamentoEstimado,p1_0.prazoEntrega,p1_0.stackTecnologica,p1_0.titulo from Anexo a1_0 join Projeto p1_0 on p1_0.id=a1_0.projeto_id join Empresa e1_0 on e1_0.id=p1_0.empresa_id join Usuario e1_1 on e1_0.id=e1_1.id where a1_0.id=?
